review_title: Opportunities for employee growth and development
review_body_text: I worked for almost 8 years at CIMB Bank and was treated very well both at the corporate and department level. The company acknowledged my hard work by promoting me up several levels. The management has been supportive on changes for improvements, colleagues are friendly and nice as well. This company offer rewards goal completion, create a career path and always promote continues learning.
pros_text: Given opportunity to work with different pillars of business.
cons_text: Work-life balance can be compromised sometimes

review_body_text: So far the software hasn't gotten me a response yet, but i am confident that this program will work. It is easy to use and user friendly. Overall, I recommend this program me to future users who are seeking an easy and convenient way of Navigating.
I enjoy working at cimb bank because paid well beside the environment very nice and the worker is very friendly. Beside that i also allowed to do overtime

Cimb bank is a good place to start our career as it offers a lot of benefits to the staff. The working environment is indeed challenging , but we gain many experience along the way. It teaches us to work under pressure and able to multitask.

Awesome place to work for fresh graduates looking for vital experience to enhance their professionalism in the industry. No jobs is easy. Mentally you must be strong on a daily basis. Having a strong character and high confidence in yourself is very important for you to survive your everyday working life.

-do marketing for govement personal loan -follow bank negara rule -need to do sale product for koperasi -solving problems , handling and negotiating with various type of custumer -need to acchive target to get a good kpi
Cimb is a good place for me to gain experience. I got very precious experience such as handling customer service, secure files and document, selling skills and experience in banking. 😁
cons_text: Handle misselling complaints and cancellation from previous staff.

review_body_text: I am satiesfied work at CIMB Bank Berhad even as SLIM trainee.From that period i have learned and gain more knowledge through system and procedure about banking which i never expected before.In addition, during training i have learned more about negotiator(collection department)by performing collection dunning to customers via negotiating with defaulters and also provide necessary advice to assist customer in making payment or restructuring their payment scheme.
Day-to-day routine work and too many papare works. High turn around make the work more harder due to change of management team. Malaysian Malay culture company.

Review and prepare the training content and teaching aids. Effective Training is to set an objective and apply the right methods to convey the message. Management is have far view what is feasible to achieve in a year and set a target and timeline, participate,monitor and motivate through out the year. Our work place culture is be fair and caring also reasoning and forcing the way out. Caught in unexpected situations, such as equipment not functioning and participants out of control. Fun in learning.

review_title: good place to develop confident in public speaking.
review_body_text: normal working day. I've learn a lot in developing my customer servicing skills. the hardest part of the job is to cross sell credit cards, loans and other banking products. the most enjoyable part is I'm able to create a lot of friends / networking.

review_title: Good compensation if you are productive
review_body_text: Benefits are good if you're performed. Support from management is not that good. Look for good support from colleagues. Learn fast and can start to enjoy the company benefits.

Overall the training provided are related to the work, the training centre is also nice and comfortable. In term of job scope is very specific. The colleagues and management are very supportive and helpful

Job those dream to work in bank. Boss is part of our trasformation actually. Guidance of boss can make us work in happy mode everyday. Unlucky my department closed in penang. So i got no way than taking my mss.
Love the positive working environment and the team members are so nice even they are in higher position. The guidance and work exposure are so helpful and motivated me to learn more about new things

On Monday I begin by going over the list from the previous week, setting priorities. I review the progress of existing projects, then check the calendar to refresh my memory on the upcoming week. I like to meet with my staff early, mid and late week to discuss priorities, check progress, and then prepare for the following week. I want to make sure, as much as possible, that we can all dedicate to tasks that move projects forward, so I make habits out of organizational tasks for speed.”
Good learning technically team can learn more while working in CIMB bank and good remuneration theyb can provide good team members .Management is not that much feasable
Company's management and additional benefits provided were excellent. Working hours still acceptable. Fun to work under banking line and have to face different kinds of customers daily.

I enjoyed this job as it fitted in with my age and career aspirations at that time. I had great colleagues and I learned a lot of things. Each day was a challenge and I found myself enjoying my job. My salary on the first month was 10k which was a wonderful surprise. I never thought that I could excel in sales but this was a breakthrough.
i've learned about the bank management how to attend customer very productive and fun the hardest part is how to handle customer the most enjoyable part is all the staff are supportive
